OPR-0005.Name: File Search & Replace
OPR-0005.Description: Complete file processing pipeline with user input, looping, and error handling. Asks for a file path, reads the file, splits into lines, replaces text in each line, and writes the result.

Data.PromptMessage: Enter a file path and name

OPR-0006.Name: Simple Echo
OPR-0006.Description: Minimal three-node operation: sets a value, formats it with a template, and writes the output. The simplest possible end-to-end pipeline.
OPR-0006.Author: Ultravisor

OPR-0007.Name: System Info Collector
OPR-0007.Description: Runs shell commands to gather system information (hostname, uptime, disk usage) and writes a report. Demonstrates command nodes with template assembly.
OPR-0007.Author: Ultravisor

OPR-0008.Name: Git Status Report
OPR-0008.Description: Runs git commands to gather repository status, branch info, and recent log, then assembles a report. Demonstrates chaining multiple command nodes with template assembly.
OPR-0008.Author: Ultravisor

OPR-0009.Name: HTTP Health Check
OPR-0009.Description: Fetches a health endpoint via HTTP GET, checks the response for a success indicator, and logs the result. Demonstrates get-text, if-conditional, and template-string for monitoring.
OPR-0009.Author: Ultravisor

OPR-0010.Name: API Data Pipeline
OPR-0010.Description: Fetches JSON from an API endpoint, extracts a field with template-string, conditionally saves the result. Demonstrates get-json, template-string, if-conditional, and write-json together.

OPR-0011.Name: Conditional File Backup
OPR-0011.Description: Reads a file, checks if it contains important markers, and conditionally backs it up. Demonstrates if-conditional branching with copy-file and error paths.

Data.MessageTemplate: Skipping backup: file does not contain a version field

OPR-0012.Name: CSV to JSON Converter
OPR-0012.Description: Reads a CSV file, parses it into records, and writes the output as JSON. Demonstrates read-file, parse-csv, and write-json in a data pipeline.

Data.MessageTemplate: CSV file contained no parseable records

OPR-0013.Name: JSON Config Merge
OPR-0013.Description: Reads two JSON config files, merges values from the override into the base, and writes the result. Demonstrates read-json, set-values, write-json.

Data.MessageTemplate: Failed to read one of the config files

OPR-0014.Name: NPM Project Validator
OPR-0014.Description: Validates an npm project by checking for package.json, verifying it has a name and version, and running npm test. Demonstrates read-json, multiple if-conditionals, and command execution.

Data.MessageTemplate: FAIL: package.json not found in current directory
FAIL: package.json is missing the 'name' field
FAIL: package.json is missing the 'version' field
FAIL: npm test exited with errors

OPR-0015.Name: Template Processor
OPR-0015.Description: Multi-step text processing pipeline. Initializes project metadata, reads a template, performs chained string replacements, validates for unresolved placeholders, and writes the output. Demonstrates state management and conditional validation.

Data.MessageTemplate: Warning: Template still contains unresolved ${...} placeholders after processing

OPR-0016.Name: Config File Processor
OPR-0016.Description: File-based config processing pipeline. Reads a config template, checks for a placeholder, replaces it with a value, and writes the output. Demonstrates branching, error handling, and file I/O.

Data.MessageTemplate: Config template does not contain the {{API_KEY}} placeholder

OPR-0017.Name: Directory Inventory
OPR-0017.Description: Lists files in a directory, counts them, and writes an inventory report. Demonstrates list-files, set-values, template-string, and write-file.

OPR-0018.Name: Expression Calculator
OPR-0018.Description: Takes user input, evaluates a mathematical expression, and writes the result. Demonstrates value-input, expression-solver, template-string, and write-file.

OPR-0019.Name: Log Line Counter
OPR-0019.Description: Reads a log file, splits it into lines, loops through each to count ERROR occurrences, and writes a summary. Demonstrates split-execute looping with if-conditional counting.

OPR-0020.Name: Text Sanitizer
OPR-0020.Description: Reads a text file and applies multiple replace-string passes to strip unwanted characters. Demonstrates chaining multiple replace-string nodes in sequence.

Data.PromptMessage: Enter the path to the text file to sanitize

OPR-0021.Name: Beacon Remote Command
OPR-0021.Description: Dispatches a shell command to a remote Beacon worker node and collects the output. Demonstrates the beacon-dispatch task type for remote execution.
OPR-0021.Author: Ultravisor
